results.rightsHolder: NSW Dept of Planning and Environment
results.eventRemarks: 2 cameras deployed at site, 100m apart: Reconyx HP2W Professional white flash with focal length customised to 90cm, and Reconyx HP2X Professional infra-red. Both cameras baited with peanut butter and oat mix plus cotton wool balls soaked in truffle oil, placed in a polypipe canister attached to a fence spacer in front of each camera, at a distance of 1m from HP2W camera and 1.5m from HP2X camera. Each camera attached to a bracket on a star picket at approx. 30cm height, and orientated so that bottom of bait canister is at centre of images. Cameras set to take 5 images per trigger with no delay. No video recorded.
